title: Incorrect case folding in the LIKE operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_case (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci);
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value LIKE 'ね';
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value LIKE 'き';
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value LIKE CONVERT(char(0x304d) USING utf8mb4);
key_bug_features: Incorrect case comparison in LIKE operator
